title:
List of accredited visa sponsorship employers (Information Technology)
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## List of accredited visa sponsorship employers (Information Technology)
I would like to ask for a list of accredited employers in the Information Technology sector who are eligible to give job offers to enable me apply for a work visa
This data would fasten my job seeking process
This will save me time to find the best employer in my field of competence for work visa application
- Rabiul 25 May 2025 at 18:56 06:56 pm (13 months ago) We also need this. This should be usefull. There should be list of enployee by Category
